scope: B6-FM fixed-margin/class-preserving C-randomization canary; dev-only; NOT confirmatory; NO tag; NO validity claim
verdict: B6-FM FAILS hard screen (NULL_label 22/50) -> fixed-margin+MARGINAL-propensity does NOT separate within-class covariate from concept (red-team-predicted); NOT a param-tune fix
caveat: propensity is MARGINAL P(C|Z,S) (Y-free); covariate_auc_gap is marginal-only (blind to within-class covariate); B6 validity depends on the estimated law; NO confirmatory validity claim

red_team.verdict: accounting_intersections PASS + science_verdict PASS; 0 serious. B6-FM FAILS hard screen as design-red-team predicted.
red_team.mechanism_refinement: the pure prior IS held fixed EXACTLY (margin_fidelity=0); NULL_label 22/50 fires because the prior-shift DGP ALSO induces WITHIN-CLASS session-covariate drift (session-1 vs session-2 Z differ within each class) that the MARGINAL Y-free propensity (auc~0.63) cannot reproduce -> reads as concept. Precise driver = within-class covariate, NOT unhandled prior.
red_team.strong_cov_genuine: 0/50 both levels, p-value-driven (median p_C 0.73/0.82, auc 0.98/1.00, lock=0), retained from B6.0 -- but does NOT rescue (fails null taxonomy on NULL_label/NULL_cov_plus_label).
red_team.pos_power: POS_concept 12 (=OLD exactly, genuine); POS_concept_plus_cov 9 vs OLD 13 / B6.0 12 (modest power cost of the tighter fixed-margin null on covariate-entangled concept -- disclose, do not fold into 'retained').
red_team.covariate_auc_gap_caveat: marginal-only, Y-free -> BLIND to the within-class covariate that drives the NULL_label failure; must NOT be read as 'covariate preserved'.
red_team.dual_witness_decision_input_NOT_b7_pass: old&plain cancels BOTH witnesses' prior-shift false-confirm (OLD=prior-witness, NULL_label old=0; plain/FM=covariate-witnesses, strong-cov 0); summed NULL false-confirm old&plain=4 vs plain&fm=37; POS 7/7. BUT this is POST-HOC on the same 50 cohorts, still leaves residual soft-cov (NCPL=3, soft=1), and the AND costs power (POS 7 vs OLD 12/13). A DECISION INPUT ONLY -- NOT a validated B7 result; B7 needs its own pre-registered packaged canary + independent red-team.
red_team.low_notes: n_eligible_crt not persisted (observability gap, 0 counts affected since 0 lock/invalid/need-more); future joins must use the GATED b6_state (not the p-only b6_confirm field); strong94 hard-screen uses <=5 vs <=3 elsewhere (immaterial, strong94=0).
